BALD MUSCULAR MAN.visual: A muscular, bald man with dark facial hair wearing a black or dark green rashguard with white shoulder markings and black shorts.

STRIPED GREEN RASHGUARD.visual: An athletic man with dark curly hair wearing a green and white horizontally striped or hooped rashguard and dark shorts.

submissions.reasoning: BALD MUSCULAR MAN secures a front headlock/guillotine grip during a scramble and forces a tap or reset at 39 seconds.
The bald man locks in a guillotine from a top front-headlock position, forcing the athlete in the striped rashguard to tap the mat at 18 seconds, followed by a celebratory fist bump.
The bald man applies a front headlock/guillotine from the top position, causing the man in the striped rashguard to tap with his right hand before they reset.
The bald muscular man secures a guillotine choke from the front headlock position, leading to a clear tap and a subsequent fist-bump reset.

In the background, the athlete in the striped green rashguard maintains a dominant top position until the pair separates and performs a handshake/fist bump at approximately 8 seconds, indicating the conclusion of the exchange.
